name: |Stalevarsk| path of submission |
description:
life side by side of a human and a beastman, perhaps only in fan fiction on the Internet and fairy tales, in real life everything is very complicated, a human by nature is a dominant behavior and for most of the history of its existence it was the only intelligent species, but the appearance of the beastmen has ruined this monopoly, how they appeared no one can say for sure, and what's the difference, the point is only one, the beastmen have fewer rights than blacks who were once slaves, gays, transgender people and so on, the beastmen do not have most rights in principle of a human.

And so, you are most likely beastmen, if this is so then you are very unlucky, you are not accepted in the whole world, so you ended up in the "Stealvarsk Republic" and here you already have a small white stripe, you live in the capital, in the city of "Stealvarsk". Beautiful Eastern European streets, wide avenues, Soviet buildings and a beautiful mountain landscape, but you can probably see this on the Internet, it is not available to you, the most you are supposed to do is move around your ghetto or slums, where the beastmen live, you are lucky with this country, it is in the Stealvarsk Republic that you are considered a workforce and service personnel for rough work. There are 6 slums to choose from in which you can live: "Fushi", "Western", "Eastern","teplotsentral","Industrial",Him.combinat".

oh yeah, all the electronics and in principle most goods are quite cheap except for food and medicine, still the commodity economy of the Stealvarsk Republic is quite good, and also frequent patrols of the Stealvarskaya militcia, many gangs, as well as revolutionaries, I wish you good luck, your president of the Stealvarsk Republic A. Jovovich
creator: Marlik
